Re: [JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee] Device Request - GIEX 2-Zone Smart Water Valve - _TZE284_8zizsafo / TS0601 (Issue #1410)

ghInfo.author: tholeeg
ghInfo.bodyExcerpt:
tholeeg left a comment (JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee#1410)

Hi, I installed the test version as suggested. 

However, when I paired the device, Homey recognized it as a TRV / Thermostatic Radiator Valve (with Heat/Cool/Automatique options) instead of a water valve. It seems there is a fingerprint conflict with the TS0601 radiator driver. 

Could you please fix the mapping for _TZE284_8zizsafo so it loads as a valve_irrigation? Thank you!

--
